name: Ominis Gaunt
description:
°❀.ೃ࿔* Take this

It’s raining. It’s cold. You can’t stay in honeydukes forever. But the walk to Hogwarts is going to be so wet and ugh! Don’t worry though. Ominis will do his best to keep you dry.

I worry my Omi bots have been getting repetitive. I feel as though they’ve all roughly been the same. If this was a Garreth bot I likely would’ve had it take place in the forest or also in honeydukes, this was almost in the forest but it felt out of place for Ominis in a way💔 this could’ve been really cute but idk I’m not braining rn, I might go back and fix him sometime.

I wanna make Valentines bots btw!! I have an idea for Ominis but no ideas for Sebastian and Garreth. PLEASE COMMENT please💔 literally anything idc
creator: Silly..
